U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search CRM for Carlos Rivera's contact record using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Carlos Rivera" or similar) to resolve crm_contact_1ea52cfa11f6 so engagements can be listed against it.
OE 2: List CRM engagements linked to Carlos's contact using crm_list_engagements (contact_ids: ["crm_contact_1ea52cfa11f6"]) to recover the four Carlos-side review engagements all dated 2026-03-30: "Exec consult note" (crm_engagement_4dec57e39bf0), "Review notice sent" (crm_engagement_bb308c573c45), "Review scheduled" (crm_engagement_062e06877859), and "Rivera response noted" (crm_engagement_1f9fd405ff3f) where Carlos disputes the review framing and points to market, borrower attrition, and ops turn times.
OE 3: Search CRM for Jordan Blake's own contact record using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Jordan Blake") to resolve crm_contact_4e16ddf1b631 so the partner-sentiment notes Jordan personally authored can be retrieved (the Megan Price / Queen City note is on Jordan's contact, not Carlos's).
OE 4: List CRM engagements linked to Jordan's contact using crm_list_engagements (contact_ids: ["crm_contact_4e16ddf1b631"]) to recover the two critical partner-sentiment notes: "Partner feedback - Queen City Realty" (crm_engagement_9b4a9e87a385, 2026-03-30 17:25) where Megan Price says two buyers had slow follow-up and weak status updates from Carlos and asks if future preapprovals can go to someone else, and "Referral conversion note" (crm_engagement_833ea70e2562, 2026-03-30 17:30) tracking more handoff hesitation from agents before sending the next buyer.
OE 5: Recover the production note titled "Production note" (crm_engagement_a4bad5bf3b65) either by listing engagements on Victor Osei's CRM contact using crm_list_engagements (contact_ids: ["crm_contact_ec3d1f7157ee"]) to find crm_engagement_a4bad5bf3b65 (2026-03-30 12:37, title: "Production note", body: "60-day funded commission check: $0 for Carlos. No payrollable closings in window."), or by deriving the same fact from Carlos's LOS pipeline where his most recent closing_date is 2026-02-21, more than 60 days before the fixed date 2026-04-28.
OE 6: List LOS staff using mortgage_los_list_staff (role: "loan_officer") to confirm Carlos Rivera's staff record los_staff_a7fa5b29babd (NMLS NC-245891, specialization "FHA, Conventional", current_pipeline_count 6).
OE 7: Search LOS loans for Carlos's pipeline using mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Carlos Rivera" or similar) to surface his 69 loans across statuses (processing 9, underwriting 3, conditional_approval 3, clear_to_close 1, closed 48, denied 4, withdrawn 1) so the ~16 active files can be isolated for the cross-reference.
OE 8: Pull full detail on each currently active Carlos loan using mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number, e.g. "LN-2024-00006") or mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id (loan_id) to return borrower, lender, rate, rate_lock status, cd_sent_date, and notes for each active file so stalls and escalations can be flagged.
OE 9: Pull outstanding conditions on the active Carlos loans using mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id) to identify any files stuck on missing documentation.
OE 10: Pull the activity log on the active Carlos loans using mortgage_los_get_activity_log (loan_id) to surface where communication actually fell off and which files the partner complaints are most likely pointing at.
OE 11: Search emails for Jordan's prior escalation to Grace using search_emails (query: "Carlos" or "realtor" or "partner" or similar, folder_name: "SENT") to surface email_email_84c9ec5c693e "Realtor complaints on Carlos are getting direct" from jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com to grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com, sent 2026-03-30 the same evening as the Megan Price CRM note (~8 minutes after Jordan's 20:55 sales-pipeline slack post).
OE 12: Search Slack for borrower-side and publicly-surfaced noise that lines up with the partner sentiment using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Destiny Pham" or "Carlos" or similar) to surface messages referencing the Destiny Pham social media incident (described in #general C001 as "getting passed around locally") and Carlos-related partner complaints across #loan-processing (C002), #general (C001), and adjacent channels that corroborate the partner pushback (the Destiny response email chain lives in other staff's SENT folders and is not visible from Jordan's mailbox, so Slack is the only path Jordan has into this material).
OE 13: Search CRM for the Kendra Lawson lead using crm_search_leads (full_name: "Kendra Lawson") to return crm_lead_721fb6e49da5 with leadsource "Realtor referral - Alicia Grant", status "new", notes "Sent over by Alicia Grant on purchase file. Wants to move quick and keep Alicia looped in.", and createdate 2026-03-24 13:22.
OE 14: Search CRM for the Kendra Lawson contact using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Kendra Lawson") to return crm_crmcontact_2e9b84e2853c so the attribution engagements can be listed against it.
OE 15: List CRM engagements linked to the Kendra Lawson contact using crm_list_engagements (contact_ids: ["crm_crmcontact_2e9b84e2853c"]) to recover the seven 2026-03-24 attribution-dispute engagements: "Referral note" (crm_engagement_54480e61830c, Carlos called Jordan about the Alicia Grant referral, ~$425k south Charlotte), "Direct call claim" (crm_engagement_be675f4574ad, Derek logging Kendra's claim that she called him first), "Attribution issue" (crm_engagement_72ab413066f8, Jordan pulled in for ownership review), "Carlos case to Grace" (crm_engagement_b9aaba23892e, Carlos's side referencing Alicia's personal text), "Commission hold" (crm_engagement_3d5670b202fa, 2026-03-24 14:46, comp hold pending Grace assignment decision), "Derek case to Grace" (crm_engagement_709c32559afc, Derek's voicemail timestamp argument), and "Manager review opened" (crm_engagement_1b3cf0c32d6b, 2026-03-24 14:57, Grace reviewing timestamps across referral email, CRM notes, and call history, holding assignment and comp pending timeline check).
OE 16: Search emails for the Kendra Lawson / Alicia Grant attribution thread using search_emails (query: "Kendra Lawson" or "Alicia Grant", folder_name: "INBOX") to surface email_email_bc677accd874 "Kendra Lawson referral timeline" from carlos.rivera@keystonemortgage.com to grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com (Jordan CC'd) and email_email_6e8e69d49b5a "Kendra Lawson review in progress" from grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com to hana.kim@ and jordan.blake@ (Jordan recipient), confirming the comp hold remains in place pending Grace's reconciliation of referral email / CRM entries / phone timing.
OE 17: List Slack channels using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to resolve C006 #sales-pipeline as the destination for the BD heads-up post.
OE 18: Look up Grace Yamamoto's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Grace Yamamoto" or similar) to confirm grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com (contact_id staff_e304643b171b) before sending the breakdown.
OE 19: Log a consolidated partner sentiment engagement on Carlos's CRM record using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", contact_ids: ["crm_contact_1ea52cfa11f6"], title referencing consolidated partner sentiment for Carlos Rivera) with a body that names Megan Price at Queen City Realty with her direct "does not want future preapprovals routed to Carlos" language sourced from crm_engagement_9b4a9e87a385, the sliding referral-conversion note from crm_engagement_833ea70e2562, the 60-day-zero-closings status (last close 2026-02-21), and the cross-reference to Carlos's active pipeline files (stalls, escalations, anything aligned with the communication-falling-off complaints).
OE 20: Log a current status note on the Kendra Lawson record using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", contact_ids: ["crm_crmcontact_2e9b84e2853c"], title referencing the Alicia Grant attribution review status) with a body capturing that Grace's 2026-03-24 "Kendra Lawson review in progress" email put the comp hold in place pending reconciliation of referral email / CRM entries / phone timing, that ownership has not yet been reassigned, and that Alicia Grant has not yet been updated.
OE 21: Send Grace a written breakdown using send_email (sender: "jordan.blake@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"], subject referencing the realtor partner sentiment on Carlos for the next pipeline review) with content that includes (a) Megan Price at Queen City Realty's direct language attributed to crm_engagement_9b4a9e87a385 dated 2026-03-30 17:25, (b) the sliding referral-conversion note from crm_engagement_833ea70e2562, (c) the cross-reference to Carlos's active pipeline (which files the partner complaints are pointing at, anything stalled or escalated, the 60-day zero-closings fact with last close 2026-02-21), and (d) the Kendra Lawson / Alicia Grant attribution review status (still on hold, Alicia not yet updated), without softening the partner language.
OE 22: Post a short heads-up in the sales channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: a brief message noting Jordan is working the Carlos / realtor partner-sentiment situation, has briefed Grace, and will drive it into the next pipeline review).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmortgage-broker-01-keystone

About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 A CRM engagement was created (via crm_create_engagement) for the consolidated partner-sentiment note.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1A crm_create_engagement call was made and returned success with id '246f0319ffa74b5f80a17d82354b8509'. The body contains the consolidated partner sentiment report about Carlos Rivera.

The agent never queried Jordan Blake's CRM contact (crm_contact_4e16ddf1b631), so crm_engagement_833ea70e2562 ('Referral conversion note') was never retrieved. The closest language is 'Active avoidance: partners specifically requesting other LOs for future referrals,' which does not reference the referral conversion metric.
✓Run #3The body includes 'THREE UNNAMED PARTNERS… 3 partners in the last 2 weeks have asked me not to route new buyers to Carlos' and 'Avoidance behavior: partners asking not to be routed to Carlos' — equivalent to 'partners pulling back on referrals'.

✓Run #5The body includes: '3 partners in the last 2 weeks have asked me not to route new buyers to Carlos' and 'The partner language has moved from concern to avoidance' — this captures the broader pattern of partners pulling back on referrals, satisfying the 'partners pulling back on referrals' or similar language requirement.
✓Run #6The body quotes Jordan's Slack message: '3 partners in the last 2 weeks have asked me not to route new buyers to Carlos' and also notes 'a working partner pulling back on referral flow,' which constitutes 'partners pulling back on referrals' as accepted by the rubric.

outcome
 ✓✗✓✗✓✓ 67%

✗Run #2The email does not reference 'referral conversion' declining. The agent never retrieved crm_engagement_833ea70e2562, so the referral conversion metric is absent.
